title: coreopsis nudata
intro: Coreopsis nudata, also known as Naked-flowered Coreopsis, is a plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its daisy-like flowers with a unique lack of petals. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis nudata include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Coreopsis nudata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
